title: Bounty
description: Hunt your Rivals: Set Custom Bounties on Other Players
body:
## Bounty Plugin
### Make your Minecraft experience even more exciting with the Bounty plugin!
Hunt other players and earn rewards. Post bounties on players. Find and defeat the targets to claim the rewards.
### Commands
**/kopfgeld** or **/bounties** for the bounty menu
**/badmin** for admin commands
### You can customize 99% of the plugin.
### Requires Vault ( https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/ )
